calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Confirmation Of Transfer
Off Calendar Aug-10-2016 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-10-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Confirmation Of Transfer
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Continued To Aug-10-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were called together: PCN-00-273088 Conservatorship of Kenneth Roeder and PTR-07-290720 The Kenneth Roeder Trust.
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Conservator/Trustee Dolores F. De Leon and the Attorney Valerie Logsdon to appear on August 10, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the check for change of venue fees has not been sent. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Petition For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Petition For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Petition For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Feb-17-2016 Continued To Mar-16-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Valerie Logsdon (via court call) for (trustee) Dolores De Leon. Court appointed counsel Lori Suzuki for Kenneth Roeder.

The Court stated that we are here on the status of filing a petition for change of venue, that a petition has already been filed in the conservatorship matter, that the trust is being administered out of the county, that there is property in San Francisco and asked why it should not be transferred to Santa Clara County. Ms. Logsdon stated that the San Francisco property is in two trusts, one trust that was established by the conservatee's brother and that Special Needs Trust that was created pursuant to a court order, that 1/2 of the property will go to the San Francisco Cancer Society and another charity upon the death of the conservatee, that the other 1/2 interest is in this trust, that they are paying San Francisco property taxes, that they would like Ms. Suzuki to stay on in case the conservatee does go back to the house, that if the trust is moved she will not be able to stay on, asks the court to keep it on track in case something comes up after he dies and that the trust will be dormant until the property sells. The Court stated that Santa Clara County is capable of handling an accounting. Ms. Logsdon stated that there is no administrative burden on the San Francisco Court and that they would like to keep Ms. Suzuki on. The Court stated that it is a burden on San Francisco right now. Ms. Logsdon stated that they only wanted the conservatorship moved not the trust. Ms. Suzuki stated that the reason for her to stay on is the conflict of interest with the Special Needs Trust and the various other trusts, that the conservator is the trustee and beneficiary and that it was always the intent of Mr. Roeder to go back home it is evident now that it is not possible. The Court stated that the trust does need to move to Santa Clara County and a petition needs to be filed. The status regarding filing a petition for change of venue was continued to March 16, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Petition For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Continued To Feb-17-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that a petition was filed in the companion case but not in the trust case, that there may have been a misunderstanding, that rather than issuing an Order to Appear the status on filing a petition for change of venue was continued to February 17, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court is to let Ms. Logsdon know of the continuance and that she needs to either file the petition or appear at the hearing.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rodrin. (Not Reported)

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Feb-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
